name: qa_manager_run_smoke_test_for_error_check_capture_and_export_pipeline
desc: QA Manager smoke test: runs the Error Manager rule engine → captures screenshots → exports every report format (Excel, XML, HTML, PDF, Word) → validates every artefact landed on disk. Returns a matrix of step/status/path/duration so the AI can diagnose broken wiring.

parameters.name: run_error_check
parameters.description: Run the Error Manager rule engine first (default: true). Set false to reuse existing .mepbridge/qa/results.xml.

parameters.name: capture_images
parameters.description: Capture hidden-view screenshots for every result (default: true). Set false for a fast text-only test.

parameters.name: exports
parameters.description: Comma-separated export formats to exercise: excel,xml,html,pdf,word. Default: all.

parameters.name: rule_set
parameters.description: Optional rule set name to pass to the error check (default: all discoverable rules).
